description: Add --version flag to display CLI version information
prompt: Add a --version flag to the CLI that displays the version number, Python version, and Claude API model being used.

key_changes: Exit after showing version (don't run workflow)
success_criteria: π --version displays version, Python version, model
Workflow does not execute when --version is used
testing_strategy: Verify version string matches expected format
Test that workflow doesn't run with --version

notes: Simple feature to test baseline plan quality for straightforward tasks
